data.title: K92 Mining outlines plan for significant production growth and exploration program by 2026.
data.description: K92 Mining has unveiled its operational guidance for 2026, revealing plans for substantial production growth and an extensive exploration program. The company aims to increase its output significantly, with a focus on expanding its operations and maximizing resources. This strategic initiative involves investing in exploration activities to identify new reserves and enhance overall production. The program is expected to drive growth and create opportunities for the company, positioning it well for success in the coming years.

data.title: Leidos to acquire ENTRUST to boost energy infrastructure, expanding utility market reach and revenue growth.
data.description: Leidos has recently completed an acquisition that will enhance its presence in the utility sector, particularly in the gas and electric generation infrastructure markets. This move is expected to broaden their capabilities and customer base significantly. The acquisition is projected to have an immediate positive impact on Leidos' revenue growth and EBITDA margin. This strategic decision underscores Leidos' commitment to tapping into the growing and robust utility budgets.

data.title: Arizona parents seek school choice options with over 1,020 schools participating in National School Choice Week.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Arizona and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 1,020 schools and organizations in Arizona are participating in this initiative, joining others across the country.

data.title: Marriott International experienced exceptional global growth in 2025, with new brand offerings, luxury expansion, and record growth in branded residences.
data.description: In the year 2025, the company experienced significant growth, highlighted by the introduction of new brand offerings and notable advancements in the midscale and luxury sectors. There was also exceptional expansion in branded residences. The company, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, revealed these achievements on January 26, 2026. Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR) announced these results, showcasing remarkable progress in various areas.

data.title: Franco-Nevada declares 19th annual dividend increase and announces chair succession plans in USD.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 26, 2026, Franco-Nevada Corporation (TSX: FNV) (NYSE: FNV) stated that its Board of Directors has approved an increase in its quarterly dividend. The new quarterly dividend has been set at US$0. [exact amount not provided] per share.

data.title: U.S. luxury housing prices vary widely, with some metros at 2× typical listings, others at over 5×.
data.description: In select metropolitan areas, luxury homes are priced at a minimum of double the average listing price, with some locations going over five times that amount. As of the latest data from January 26, 2026, in Austin, Texas, there has been a leveling off of luxury home costs compared to the previous year's end. Disparities between luxury property prices and standard listings differed significantly among various housing markets, reflecting a diverse range of multiples.

data.title: Avoid missing the Feb. 2nd deadline by using ezPaycheck for secure e-filing of 941 forms. Halfpricesoft.com introduces new feature for IRS-compliant service.
data.description: Businesses have until February 2nd to securely e-file their 941 forms using Halfpricesoft.com's IRS-compliant service. The latest feature ensures timely filing. Halfpricesoft.com, based in REDMOND, Wash., made the announcement on January 26, 2026.

data.title: 68 semifinalists announced for Operation Homefront's 2026 Military Child of Year Award.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 26, 2026, Operation Homefront, a national nonprofit dedicated to supporting military and veteran families, has revealed the 68 semifinalists vying for the 2026 Military Child of the Year® Award. This prestigious award recognizes the exceptional qualities and achievements of military children in various categories.

data.title: Bridgewater State Univ partners with eCampus.com for textbook services & campus store operations. ( Words: 105 )
data.description: Bridgewater State University has recently partnered with eCampus.com to enhance their textbook ordering process, offering various format options for students. With this partnership, students can access a streamlined ordering system and a revamped on-campus retail space. This initiative was implemented on January 26, 2026, aiming to provide better services for the university community.

data.title: HTX launches a new Earn product matrix with increased APY and diversified assets, enhancing user growth opportunities.
data.description: In Panama City on January 26, 2026, HTX has announced enhancements to its Earn product matrix. The updates include a wider variety of assets and innovative incentive structures to provide more opportunities for users to increase their assets. These changes come as part of HTX's efforts to adapt to the evolving market conditions.

data.title: Preliminary data on early redemptions announced by Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S on January 26, 2026 in Announcement no. 7/2026.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Announcement no. 7/2026 was released to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S.

data.title: Viveka Health obtains HITRUST e1 Certification with help from Palindrome Technologies - a milestone in cybersecurity commitment.
data.description: Viveka Health, a top AI-powered health benefits administration platform, has proudly attained the HITRUST e1 Certification with the help of its key partnership with Palindrome Technologies. The noteworthy accomplishment was made public on January 26, 2026, in Princeton, N.J. This certification underscores Viveka Health's commitment to data security and compliance.

data.title: 1 in 10 Gen Zers seek STI diagnosis from AI chatbots like ChatGPT, despite frequent misdiagnoses.
data.description: In recent findings from Seattle on Jan. 26, 2026, it was revealed that the younger generation known as Gen Z is relying more on AI technology like ChatGPT for seeking information on sexually transmitted infections (STIs). A recent survey indicated that youngsters are utilizing AI chatbots for guidance on STIs and other sexual health queries. However, concerns have been raised about the accuracy of the diagnoses provided by these AI tools, with a significant number of cases reporting misdiagnoses among Gen Z individuals.

data.title: Kaldalón hf. announced buying 604,184 shares in week 4 of 2026 for ISK 16,572,968 as part of a buyback program.
data.description: During the fourth week of 2026, Kaldalón hf. bought back a total of 604,184 shares at a cost of ISK 16,572,968.
